blocks.text: Hovland two shots off the lead — THE PLAYERS title in range

T13 at -3 after round two, two shots off McNealy's five-way tie at the top — Hovland is perfectly placed for a weekend charge at TPC Sawgrass. NRK is already watching. Bodo/Glimt's 3-0 demolition of Sporting CP on Wednesday has Norwegian sport riding high.
🏎️ Fri 04:30 — F1 Chinese GP, Shanghai — Russell leads early championship battle
